title: FishOnMC Extras R
description: A FishOnMC enhancing mod that focuses on QOL and immersion
body:
FOER (FishOnMC-Extras-R) is a QOL mod for play.fishonmc.net. It has many QOL and other immersive features to improve the player experience on the server.

# 📋 Features
- Statistics Tracking 
  - Fish
  - Pets
  - *ALL* other items
- New notifier
- Custom HUD Creator
- Custom Button Creator
- Custom Chat Trigger Creator
- Custom Notifications for Notifier
- Custom Timers
- Placeholders to get data into text fields
- Stats importing
- Pet percentages
- Item rarity marker
- /ah price per item
- Crew chat marker
- Tooltip hover
- Search bars in /ah, /pv and chests
- Tacklebox Lock icon on Bait Slot
- Item Equipped item on pets
- Hide Armor toggle
- Small buttons to Inventory for Config Screen and Button Creator
- Crew Join/Leave notifications
- Put crew members on top of tab list
- Bait 3D model below fishing bobber
- Light source on bobber
- Armor rolls and cost to armor tooltip and roll screen
- And more...

# 🔨 Configuration
Configuration of the mod is easily done by pressing `O`.
You can access the config directly.
Can also move the HUD elements position!
